title: Dashboard for multiple boards
excerpt: I’m trying to create a Dashboard that connects three high-level boards. Each board represents an event, and currently has it’s own dashboard, but for purposes of reporting up I’m trying to tie all together so I can show …

posts.author: Jack.lme (Jack Lines)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to create a Dashboard that connects three high-level boards. Each board represents an event, and currently has it’s own dashboard, but for purposes of reporting up I’m trying to tie all together so I can show in one board (within the same widget) all the ‘overdue items’ across all three events, or all the risks flagged as ‘red’ across all three events.

Currently it let’s me select which event I want to report on, but I can’t find a way to show all three at the same time…? Hopefully there is a way?!

Thanks!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jack.lme

I am not the master of dashboards but if you want to rollup multiple (event) boards into a high-level board you might want to have a look at this app https://monday.com/marketplace/101
